# Using form and multipart in the same call site is rejected

! muxt generate --use-receiver-type=T
stderr 'has both "form" and "multipart" arguments'

-- in.go --
package main

import "mime/multipart"

type (
	T  struct{}
	In struct {
		Title string
	}
)

func (T) Upload(form In, m *multipart.Form) int { return 0 }

-- template.go --
package main

import (
	"embed"
	"html/template"
)

//go:embed template.gohtml
var templatesDir embed.FS

var templates = template.Must(template.ParseFS(templatesDir, "template.gohtml"))

-- go.mod --
module example.com

go 1.22

-- template.gohtml --
{{define "POST / Upload(form, multipart)" }}<p>{{.}}</p>{{end}}
